findings.description: Dead code: SEED.REQUEST_SUCCESS, SEED.REQUEST_ERROR, and empty comment 'Request rate baseline ranges' left behind after removing requestRates procedure

Integration tests duplicate performK8sHealthCheck logic instead of calling the actual router/procedure. Tests verify a reimplementation, not the real code path. Should use a caller test or import the function.
Unused mock variables: mockSelect, mockInsert, mockUpdate, mockFrom, mockWhere, mockReturning, mockSet declared but never used
Use of `any` type assertions (n: any, p: any) in test file instead of proper K8s types
